---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement for the project
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What workflow or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Video source

Where do your video files come from?

## Typical duration

How long are the videos you usually process?

## Language

What language or language mix do these videos contain?

## Downstream goal

What do you want to do after transcription?

## Proposed change

What would you like to see added or improved?

## Why this matters

How would this help your video knowledge or LLM workflow?

## Notes

Anything else that would help scope the request.
